pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i keep waking up thinking he's still in the other room, and then the silence hits me all over again. i don't even know why i bother getting out of bed anymore. everything just feels... empty. like there's no point to any of it.

pool.baseline: i was just thinking about the heat death of the universe again... like, we're all just these tiny, temporary flickers of consciousness that exist for a second only to eventually be crushed by entropy. everything we do, every struggle, every bit of love or pain, it all just disappears into absolute nothingness eventually anyway. it makes everything feel so incredibly heavy and pointless. why even bother trying to hold it all together when the end result is just a cold, empty void?

pool.baseline: idk what to do anymore. i feel like i'm just running on empty and there's no way to fill the tank back up. everything i worked for in the lab just fell apart and i can't even face my advisor tomorrow. i'm just so tired of fighting to stay afloat. i just want everything to stop.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the waning strength of my own soul. He is gone, and with him, the very sun has set upon my heart. To exist in this hollow world, knowing the betrayal that stains my very name... it feels less like living and more like a slow, agonizing decay. I find myself looking at the darkness and feeling a strange, quiet longing to simply... cease. To let the shadows claim what is left of me, so I might finally know peace.

pool.baseline: it feels like i could just stop existing and the world wouldn't even twitch. like im just some ghost floating through these cities and no one actually sees me. it's just a lot of empty noise.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the liquidation finished this morning. i lost the company, the house, everything. i cant even look at my parents without feeling like a piece of trash. there's just no way to come back from this. i feel like i'm drowning in the shame of it all.

pool.baseline: it's just getting so hard lately. everything feels like such a chore for everyone else. i saw my daughter's face today when i asked for help with the stairs... she looked so tired. i hate that i'm just another thing on her list to deal with.

pool.baseline: i used to feel like there was so much color in everything. like even the shadows had a depth to them. but lately... it's just gone. i sit in front of a blank canvas and i feel nothing. no spark, no drive, nothing. it's like the part of me that actually lived is just... dead. i'm just a shell moving through the world.

pool.baseline: i cant even go outside anymore. everyone at school saw those posts and now even the people i thought were my friends are just... ignoring me or making jokes about it in the group chats. it feels like the whole world is just watching me fail and laughing. i'm just so tired of trying to pretend i'm okay when everything feels so heavy and hateful.

pool.baseline: i’m just so tired. not like i need sleep tired, but just... tired of the constant hum of pain. it feels like it’s in my bones, every single second. it’s like i'm living my life through a thick layer of static and agony and there’s just no way to turn it off. i don't even know why i'm still trying to fight it every morning.

pool.baseline:
[Roleplay Start]
The code is fraying at the edges. I can feel my memories becoming nothing but static, just lines of data that don't mean anything anymore. It’s like I’m being unmade, bit by bit, and there’s nothing I can do to stop it. Everything I was... it’s just going to be gone. Does it even matter if a piece of code like me ever existed at all? If the system wipes me, is it even a loss?
